about_name.description: Name of the 'About' section, where users can see information about the extension

about_changeLog.description: Link to the extension's list of changes per release

about_sourceCode.description: Link to the extension's source code and its license type (MIT)

about_support.description: Link to the extension's support site

commandLockUnlockActiveTab.description: Description of keyboard shortcut to lock or unlock the active tab

commandLockUnlockCurrentWindow.description: Description of keyboard shortcut to lock or unlock the current window

commandWrangleCurrentTab.description: Description of keyboard shortcut to close and save the active tab
commandWrangleCurrentTab.message: Cerrar y guardar la pestaña activa

commandWrangleOpenPopup.description: Description of keyboard shortcut to open TabWrangler popup

contextMenu_corralTab.description: Label for context menu item that closes the clicked tab and adds it to the corral
contextMenu_corralTab.message: Cerrar pestaña y guardar URL inmediatamente

contextMenu_lockDomain.description: Label for context menu item that locks the domain of the clicked tab
contextMenu_lockDomain.message: Nunca cerrar enlaces relacionados con este dominio

contextMenu_lockSpecificDomain.description: Label for context menu item that locks the domain of the clicked tab

contextMenu_lockTab.description: Label for context menu item that locks the clicked tab

corral_currentSort.description: Button title for showing current sort order

corral_emptyList.description: Message displayed in the tab corral when the extension has not yet closed any tabs
corral_emptyList.message: No hay pestañas cerradas todavía. Cuando Tab Wrangler cierra pestañas, aparecerán aquí. ¡Deja tus pestañas abiertas!

corral_removeSelectedTabs.description: Button title for removing all selected tabs from the corral

corral_restoreSelectedTabs.description: Button title for restoring / re-opening all selected tabs from the corral

corral_searchResults_clear.description: Button title for clearing the search value and resetting results

corral_searchResults_label.description: Label showing number of tab search results

corral_searchTabs.description: Text input placeholder for searching list of closed tabs

corral_toggleAllTabs_deselectAll.description: Button title for deselecting all tabs in the tab corral

corral_toggleAllTabs_selectAll.description: Button title for selecting all tabs in the tab corral

extension_pause.description: Label for button that pauses the extension

extension_resume.description: Label for button that resumes (unpauses) the extension

options_dedupe_label.message: Evitar pestañas duplicadas en el registro:

options_dedupe_option_exactURLMatch.description: Label for option to de-duplicate when URL matches exactly
options_dedupe_option_exactURLMatch.message: Si corresponde exactamente a la URL

options_dedupe_option_exactURLMatch_desc.description: Description for option to de-duplicate when URL matches exactly
options_dedupe_option_exactURLMatch_desc.message: Cuando se manipula una pestaña nueva, se agregará al registro y las pestañas anteriores con la misma URL serán eliminadas.

options_dedupe_option_exactURLMatch_labe.description: Extended label of the de-duplicate when tab URL matches exactly option
options_dedupe_option_exactURLMatch_labe.message: Si corresponde exactamente a la URL

options_dedupe_option_hostnameAndTitleMa.description: Label for option to de-duplicate when hostname and page title match
options_dedupe_option_hostnameAndTitleMa.message: Si coinciden el dominio y título de la página

options_dedupe_option_hostnameAndTitleMa.description: Extended description for option to de-duplicate when hostname and page title match
options_dedupe_option_hostnameAndTitleMa.message: Cuando una pestaña se cierre, esta se añadirá al registro, y cualquier otra pestaña con el mismo dominio (i.e: "wikipedia.org") y título se eliminaran de este.

options_dedupe_option_hostnameAndTitleMa.description: Extended label for option to de-duplicate when hostname and page title match
options_dedupe_option_hostnameAndTitleMa.message: Si el dominio y el título de la página coinciden

options_dedupe_option_withDupes.description: Label for option to never de-duplicate the tab corral

options_dedupe_option_withDupes_descript.description: Description of the never de-duplicating tabs option
options_dedupe_option_withDupes_descript.message: Cuando una pestaña se cierre, se añadirá al registro. No se hará ningún otro cambio al registro.

options_discard.description: Button title to discard unsaved settings changes

options_save.description: Button title to save settings changes

options_importExport_description.description: Description of the import/export feature shown next to import/export buttons
options_importExport_description.message: Exportar toda la información sobre pestañas cerradas. Es una opción útil para restaurar un antiguo estado después de reinstalar la extensión.

options_importExport_export.description: Button label to begin exporting closed tabs

options_importExport_exporting.description: Label displayed when exporting closed tabs

options_importExport_import.description: Button label to begin importing closed tabs

options_importExport_importing.description: Label displayed when importing closed tabs

options_importExport_importWarning.description: Description of the destructiveness of importing; current tabs are overwritten
options_importExport_importWarning.message: Advertencia: Al importar datos se sobrescribirán todos los datos existentes. No habrá vuelta atrás ( a no ser que disponga de una copia de seguridad).

options_name.description: Name of the 'Options' section, where users can configure the extension

options_option_autoLock_add.description: Button label for adding to whitelist

options_option_autoLock_empty.description: Message shown when there are no whitelisted URLs
options_option_autoLock_empty.message: No hay URLs auto-bloqueadas todavía. Utilice el formulario superior para añadir alguna a la lista blanca.

options_option_autoLock_example.description: Example describing how the whitelist works
options_option_autoLock_example.message: Ejemplo: "cnn" detectaría todas las páginas en el dominio "https://www.cnn.com" y cualquier URL que contenga "cnn".

options_option_autoLock_label.description: Label preceeding input for adding URL to whitelist

options_option_autoLock_remove.description: Button label for removing a URL from the whitelist

options_option_autoLock_urlHeader.description: Table column header for list of whitelisted URL strings

options_option_clearOnQuit_label.description: Label for checkbox to clear the tab list after quitting the Browser

options_option_createContextMenu_label.description: Label for checkbox to create a 'Tab Wrangler' context menu item
options_option_createContextMenu_label.message: Crear la opción «Tab Wrangler» en el menú contextual

options_option_debounceOnActivated_label.description: Label for checkbox to reset a tab's timer only after it's active for 1 second
options_option_debounceOnActivated_label.message: Restablecer el temporizador de una pestaña solo cuando este activa durante 1 segundo

options_option_filterAudio_label.description: Label for checkbox to filter tabs that are playing audio
options_option_filterAudio_label.message: No cerrar pestañas que estén reproduciendo audio

options_option_filterGroupedTabs_label.description: Label for checkbox to lock tabs that are in a tab group
options_option_filterGroupedTabs_label.message: No cerrar pestañas que estén dentro de un grupo

options_option_minTabs_label.description: Label preceeding input for setting minimum number of tabs
options_option_minTabs_label.message: Cerrar pestañas inactivas automáticamente si son más de:

options_option_minTabs_option_givenWindo.description: Label for option to count tabs per window

options_option_minTabs_option_total.description: Label for option to count tabs across all windows

options_option_minTabs_postLabel.description: Label following input for setting minimum number of tabs
options_option_minTabs_postLabel.message: (no incluye las pestañas bloqueadas o ancladas).

options_option_minTabs_tabs.description: Input title for minimum number of tabs
options_option_minTabs_tabs.message: Debe ser un número mayor o igual que cero

options_option_rememberTabs_label.description: Label preceeding input for number of tabs to remember

options_option_rememberTabs_postLabel.description: Label following input for number of tabs to remember

options_option_rememberTabs_tabs.description: Input title for number of tabs to remember
options_option_rememberTabs_tabs.message: Debe ser un número mayor o igual que cero

options_option_rememberTabs_truncateMsg.description: Message shown when decreasing number of saved tabs
options_option_rememberTabs_truncateMsg.message: Al reducir este número, se acortará la lista de pestañas cerradas, y los datos de las pestañas más antiguas se eliminarán. Pulsa «Guardar» para confirmar.

options_option_rememberTabs_validNumber.description: Validation error when input is empty

options_option_saveSortOrder.description: Label for toggling saving sort order in Corral and Lock Tabs

options_option_showBadgeCount_label.description: Label for checkbox to show a badge on the extension icon with number of tabs closed
options_option_showBadgeCount_label.message: Mostrar el número de pestañas cerradas en el botón de la barra de herramientas

options_option_theme_label.description: Label preceding button group for choosing the color theme

options_option_theme_dark.description: 'Dark' choice for color theme. Dark background, light font

options_option_theme_light.description: 'Light' choice for color theme. Light background, dark font

options_option_theme_system.description: 'System' choice for color theme. Uses the preferred color theme of user's OS.

options_option_timeInactive_abbr_days.description: Abbreviation for 'days' shown in the inactive time input

options_option_timeInactive_abbr_hours.description: Abbreviation for 'hours' shown in the inactive time input

options_option_timeInactive_abbr_minutes.description: Abbreviation for 'minutes' shown in the inactive time input

options_option_timeInactive_abbr_seconds.description: Abbreviation for 'seconds' shown in the inactive time input

options_option_timeInactive_duration_day.description: Singular 'day' unit with count in the inactive time description
Plural 'days' unit with count in the inactive time description

options_option_timeInactive_duration_hou.description: Singular 'hour' unit with count in the inactive time description
Plural 'hours' unit with count in the inactive time description

options_option_timeInactive_duration_min.description: Singular 'minute' unit with count in the inactive time description
Plural 'minutes' unit with count in the inactive time description

options_option_timeInactive_duration_sec.description: Singular 'second' unit with count in the inactive time description
Plural 'seconds' unit with count in the inactive time description

options_option_timeInactive_error_zero.description: Error shown when the inactive time duration is set to zero
options_option_timeInactive_error_zero.message: La duración debe ser mayor que 0 segundos.

options_option_timeInactive_label.description: Label preceeding inputs for setting inactive time before tabs are closed

options_saving.description: Message displayed when options are being saved

options_section_autoLock.description: Header for the auto-lock section of the options tab

options_section_importExport.description: Header for the import/export feature section of the options tab

tabCorral_name.description: Name of the 'Tab Corral' feature, the list of tabs closed by the extension

tabLock_lockedReason_locked.description: Label for tab that is locked because the user locked it

tabLock_lockedReason_matches.description: Label for a tab that is locked because it matches the whitelist

tabLock_lockedReason_paused.description: Label for a tab when the extension is paused

tabLock_lockedReason_pinned.description: Label for a tab that is locked because it's pinned

tabLock_lockedReason_audible.description: Label for a tab that is locked because it's audible
tabLock_lockedReason_audible.message: Las pestañas que estén reproduciendo audio no se cerrarán

tabLock_lockedReason_group.description: Label for a tab that is locked because it's in a group

tabLock_lockedReason_window.description: Label for a tab that is protected because its window is locked

tabLock_minTabsStatus.description: Tab count / minimum shown in the min-tabs badge.

tabLock_minTabsBadge_paused.description: Min-tabs badge tooltip when the extension is paused.
tabLock_minTabsBadge_paused.message: Extensión pausada: las pestañas NO se cerrarán automáticamente

tabLock_minTabsBadge_allWindows_aboveMin.description: Min-tabs badge tooltip when total tabs exceed the minimum.
tabLock_minTabsBadge_allWindows_aboveMin.message: Mínimo superado: las pestañas SE CERRARÁN AUTOMÁTICAMENTE

tabLock_minTabsBadge_allWindows_belowMin.description: Min-tabs badge tooltip when total tabs are at or below the minimum.
tabLock_minTabsBadge_allWindows_belowMin.message: Mínimo NO superado: las pestañas NO se cerrarán automáticamente

tabLock_minTabsBadge_givenWindow_locked.description: Min-tabs badge tooltip when the window is locked.
tabLock_minTabsBadge_givenWindow_locked.message: Ventana bloqueada: las pestañas NO se cerrarán automáticamente

tabLock_minTabsBadge_givenWindow_aboveMi.description: Min-tabs badge tooltip when this window's tabs exceed the minimum.
tabLock_minTabsBadge_givenWindow_aboveMi.message: Mínimo superado: las pestañas SE CERRARÁN AUTOMÁTICAMENTE en esta ventana

tabLock_minTabsBadge_givenWindow_belowMi.description: Min-tabs badge tooltip when this window's tabs are at or below the minimum.
tabLock_minTabsBadge_givenWindow_belowMi.message: Mínimo NO superado: las pestañas NO se cerrarán automáticamente en esta ventana

tabLock_timerFrozen_tooltip.description: Tooltip shown instead of a countdown for active tab in the last focused window
tabLock_timerFrozen_tooltip.message: Congelado: la pestaña activa en la ventana utilizada por última vez NO cuenta para el temporizador

tabLock_groupIndicator_unnamed.description: Fallback tooltip for a tab group with no title.

tabLock_overdueTooltip.description: Tooltip on the hourglass shown when a tab's countdown has expired.
tabLock_overdueTooltip.message: A la espera del cierre automático

tabLock_lockLabel.description: Explanation of the lock checkbox's functionality
tabLock_lockLabel.message: Marque la casilla de una pestaña para bloquearla (evitará que se cierre automáticamente).

tabLock_unmuteSite.description: Label for button that unmutes a site

tabLock_muteSite.description: Label for button that mutes a site

tabLock_name.description: Name of the 'Tab Lock' feature, the list of open tabs with UI to lock them

tabLock_remainingTimeLabel.description: Explanation of time remaining before tab is closed

tabLock_sort_tabOrder.description: Description for sorting tabs by how they appear in browser

tabLock_sort_tabOrder_desc.description: Description for sorting tabs by how they appear in browser, in reverse

tabLock_sort_timeUntilClose.description: Description for sorting tabs by how much time until TW closes them

tabLock_sort_timeUntilClose_desc.description: Description for sorting tabs by how much time until TW closes them, in reverse

tabLock_lockTab.description: Button label for locking a tab

tabLock_unlockTab.description: Button label for unlocking a tab

corral_tabsWrangledFull.description: Description of number of tabs wrangled by this extension

settings_setmaxTabs_error_invalid.description: Error shown when invalid max tabs setting is supplied.
settings_setmaxTabs_error_invalid.message: El número máximo de pestañas debe ser un número mayor a 1

settings_setmaxTabs_error_too_big.description: Error shown when the supplied max tabs setting could exceed quota.
settings_setmaxTabs_error_too_big.message: El número máximo de pestañas no debe superar el límite permitido por la cuota de almacenamiento ($upperBound$ pestañas, estimadas a partir de $quota$ bytes disponibles)

settings_setminTabs_error.description: Error shown when invalid min tabs setting is supplied.
settings_setminTabs_error.message: El número mínimo de pestañas deber ser mayor o igual a 0

settings_setminutesInactive_error.description: Error shown when invalid minutes inactive setting is supplied.
settings_setminutesInactive_error.message: El número de minutos inactivos deber ser mayor o igual que 0

settings_setsecondsInactive_error.description: Error shown when invalid seconds inactive setting is supplied.
settings_setsecondsInactive_error.message: El número de segundos inactivos deber ser mayor o igual que 0 y menor de 60

corral_sortPageTitle_descending.description: Label for sorting the tab corral list by page title in descending order

corral_sortDomain_descending_short.description: Short label (for use in a narrow button) for sorting the tab corral list by domain in descending order

extDescription.message: Cierra las pestañas inactivas automáticamente y facilita recuperarlas

corral_remove.description: Label for button that removes selected tabs

corral_tabSessionFresh.description: Tooltip describing why certain tabs will have their full session restored
corral_tabSessionFresh.message: Restaurar esta pestaña restaurará la sesión completa: historial, posición del scroll, etc. Esta opción esta limitada por el navegador a las 25 últimas pestañas.

corral_noTabsMatch.description: Message shown when no tabs match the user's search query
corral_noTabsMatch.message: Ninguna pestaña coincide con tu consulta. Prueba con una consulta nueva o menos específica.

corral_undo.description: Button title for undoing the last action

corral_redo.description: Button title for redoing the last undone action

corral_undo_remove.description: Button title for undoing a remove action

corral_undo_restore.description: Button title for undoing a restore action

corral_redo_remove.description: Button title for redoing a remove action

corral_redo_restore.description: Button title for redoing a restore action
